creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text: Would it be ok if I moved corosync and pacemaker under sysutils?  I'm working on an update of heartbeat and that already lives under sysutils.  In gentoo they are all in a sys-cluster category.  Also, if I understand things correctly pacemaker can work with heartbeat instead of corosync.  I wonder if we should have separate ports for that, like pacemaker-corosync and pacemaker-heartbeat.
